title_en: Cilantro: The Heavy Metal Detox Hero
title_es: Cilantro: El Héroe Detox de Metales Pesados
hook_en: Did you know this herb fights metal toxins?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que esta hierba combate toxinas metálicas?
key_message: Cilantro helps detoxify heavy metals like mercury and lead. Add it raw to your dishes for maximum benefits.
visual_elements: Adding cilantro to a finished dish
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Cilantro — Contains compounds that help the body detoxify heavy metals like mercury and lead (Tip: Add raw to finished dishes — heat destroys the beneficial volatile oils)

title_es: Maximiza el Poder Detox del Cilantro
hook_en: Boost your detox with this simple tip!
hook_es: ¡Mejora tu detox con este simple consejo!
key_message: To preserve cilantro's detoxifying volatile oils, always add it raw to your finished dishes.
visual_elements: Sprinkling raw cilantro on plated food
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Cilantro — Contains compounds that help the body detoxify heavy metals like mercury and lead (Tip: Add raw to finished dishes — heat destroys the beneficial volatile oils)
